entry.title: Re: Individual multiplier schemes for each assignment - V...
entry.content: I think something must be off in your configuration because the purpose of ABR is to be able to enter different recommendations (as well as guidelines) for different employee history records the employee has.

entry.title: Re: How does your business manage items like first aid an...
entry.content:
Hi @Sarah_Rothery 

I've used Curricula Retraining to manage license renewals for several large organizations in Western Australia, including those in healthcare and the mining and resources sectors.

While it's not a perfect solution—particularly for licenses like the MSIC, which can have 2-, 3-, or 5-year renewal periods, or temporary High Risk Work Licenses (HRWL) that expire after just three months—we've adopted a consistent approach. We align all licenses to a 5-year renewal cycle by recording the start date accordingly and noting the actual expiry details in the Learning History Record.

I understand that enabling end dates for items would require a significant overhaul of the LMS functionality, but it would be a valuable enhancement for managing compliance more effectively.

Please feel free to reach out via email or message to discuss, as I'm sure that I have come across similar challenges and may be able to offer potential solutions or ideas.

Best regards,
Nathan H.

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Set default value when creating a sales order

Thank you

entry.title: Payment Times Report - Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
Executing payment times report, but currently, SAP only generates the Payment times report (PTR) in csv format. Is there any way to obtain the responsible member declaration template from SAP? If not, it is possible to include this in the existing functionality?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Payment Times Report - Statutory Reporting
entry.content:
Hi,

 

The statutory reporting relies on tax data, as all applicable taxes must be submitted to the tax authorities. The legal file generated when running the report follows a standard format defined by the tax authority or government

As per statutory reporting guidelines, report is created based upon the tax authority provided format. Please use the standard report which is delivered by SAP.

 

If a different template or format is used, the generated file will not be accepted by the tax authority.

 

Please refer the below help document supported compliance tasks by country/region for statutory reporting (Including with Payment time report),

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/71af4585db6d4904b1724730f3776c9b/097165e9c1074038847625e5c53e07d2.html?locale=en-US

 

Best regards,

SAP Support - S/4HANA Cloud

entry.title: Case Management with Sales order related
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are currently working with SAP Services Cloud Version 2 and we are using the case management funciontality. is there a way to create a case taking the initial information from a sales order that was created in S4hana and has been replicated in SAP Services? or is the case only created related to the customer?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Wn-mxCqPB6k 

API Scenario requests are not showing in My Inbox. Form Requests shows fine, i can approve / reject. only API requests are not showing up in the App. I tried to execute the Network call with no filters, but no luck.

entry.title: Re: Changes in SAP GUI 800 Patch 5+ Affecting RPA Automation (Windows)

entry.title: Re: My Inbox PO Link Opens ME23N Instead of Fiori App "Ma...
entry.content: Dear @noobs, Would you please find more details in the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0002822661? This is due to the PO is created with some features which are not supported in the Fiori app 'Manage Purchase Orders', so it will be displayed with me23n.

entry.title: Re: My Inbox PO Link Opens ME23N Instead of Fiori App "Ma...
entry.content: Dear @noobs, Would you please find more details from the KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0002822661? This is because the impacted POs were create with features are not supported in Fiori app, so these POs will be displayed in app me23n.

entry.title: Re: Notification for the released parked invoice in SAP S4hana public cloud

entry.title: Enhancing VIM fiori app Gateway service
entry.content:
Hello all, 

I am trying to check for the feasiblity to enhance the gateway service for Vendor Invoice management application provided by OpenText. The gateway service is PF05_DATA. I have run through a few posts but there is not enough information that helps me to understand if this gateway service can be enhanced. I could only get the service name and the data provider class but could not see a provision to enhance. I could not figure out the BSP application associated with the app nor able to find in the data provider class where the data is retrieved from.

entry.title: Re: Notification for the released parked invoice in SAP S...
entry.content:
Hi, this can be achieved by email template configuration in app Maintain Email Templates. For detailed information please refer to this online documentation, section "Optional: Maintain Email Templates": https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/ff92035b3da94a14a3d2d0faffad564c.html?locale=en-US

  • Email notification for workflow initiators in case of workflow approval:
    Copy the predelivered email template SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY into your namespace. The custom template must follow this pattern: YY1__COMPLETE_POSITIVE.
    • Workflow for Blocked Invoice
      So please use: YY1_00800251_COMPLETE_POSITIVE.
    • Workflow for Parked Invoice as Complete
      So please use: YY1_00800303_COMPLETE_POSITIVE.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic Configuration in SAP Integration Suite: One Tenant, Multiple Environments
entry.content: please replicate the iflows so that the dev work won't impact the test.

entry.title: The requested end date in service order can't be changed
entry.content: The requested end date will always be set to three days later than the posting date (requested start date) automatically, and can't be changed.

entry.title: Service Entry Sheet Tolerance
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created a Service PO with qty 1 & net Price 5000. Than I created a SES for Qty 1 & Value $237.

The invoice comes in for $237.35. When I post this invoice the invoice does not post as it is imbalanced by 0.35 cents.

I want the SES/Invoice to have a tolerance of $250/- only. So that any invoice that has a variance of $250/- it is posted insted of going into exception handling.

Please advise if there is any other tolerance configuration for SES  apart from OMR6 PP Key.

Thanks

Anuj

entry.title: Re: ABAP Adaptation for Any Middleware to CPI/IS Migration ( RFC to Webservice )
entry.content: Nice blog post Hasini, listing down all the needed steps in detail. Good work !

entry.title: Add field CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup to API/BO Interface DebitMemoRequest/CustomerReturn
entry.content:
I have checked the provided API and BO INTERFACE, and i can not found the field "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup". So how can I fill "CustomerAccountAssignmentGroup" into CustomerReturn and DebitMemoRequest.

DebitMemoRequest API: /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_DEBIT_MEMO_REQUEST_SRV/A_DebitMemoRequest('70000015')

CustomerReturn API: /sap/opu/odata/sap/API_CUSTOMER_RETURN_SRV/A_CustomerReturn('60000069')

DebitMemoRequest BO INTERFACE: i_debitmemorequesttp

CustomerReturn BO INTERFACE: i_customerreturntp

entry.title: Re: ABAP Adaptation for Any Middleware to CPI/IS Migration ( RFC to Webservice )
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"The integration platform that enables communication between SAP and external systems. In any middleware, RFC adapters are commonly used to interact with remote systems through RFCs. However, with the shift to SAP CPI/IS, the integration landscape changes, and CPI/IS does not support sender RFCs, so  it is necessary to refactor and convert these RFC calls into SOAP web services."

 

Such a great sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Is 5.0 fp01 release?
entry.content:
We cannot select the FRUN 5.0 FP01 in the Maintenance Planner when planning the FRUN upgrade. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is 5.0 fp01 release?
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

Dear Customer,

The FRUN 5.0 FP01 is in the test phase, and it hasn't been released yet. But according to SAP Cloud ALM for Operations - Introduction, the FRUN will be released in the 2025 Q2. Thank you for your patience. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Individual multiplier schemes for each assignment - V...
entry.content:
Hi Xavier, please allow me to share my system's screenshots to help me explain better the issue I am facing. Below are the screenshots for the config.

Screenshot 1 shows the plan - we can see assignments are coming in. Grade Category in summary row is a field from EC.

Screenshot 2 - Assignment details shows the Grade Category and Grade Category 1 - these are EH fields. We can ignore Grade Category 1 for now. If we look at this employee's Grade Category, it is defined as Associate/Supervisor for the 1st and 2nd assignment. Guideline for Associate/Supervisor is set as '200'. However, guideline's parameter is Grade Category from summary row. Reason is guidelines parameter is not allowing for a field from Assignment details section to be added as parameter. As a result, as of 31st Dec this employee has Grade Category 'Manager' and hence the guideline is getting defaulted to 200% for every assignment.

I am looking for a way where guideline parameter can be made as assignment detail's Grade Category field, and that way, it should solve the problem. I tried making it as an entry level field by putting in the column id in the formula, but that doesn't work either, neither can this be made as an aggregate field.

Please do let me know if I am setup something incorrectly here. Thankyou for sharing your insights as always @xavierlegarrec

entry.title: Re: CAP - Creating multiple draft enabled entities by cod...
entry.content:
Have you taken a look at this, specifically: Programmatic Invocation of Draft Actions

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/fiori#programmatic-invocation-of-draft-actions

Maybe this could help: 

await srv.new(MyEntity.drafts, data) // create new draft

I have created draft entities from children before. See the action fillEntities here

await this.create(ServiceAuth.drafts).entries({
            to_ServiceRole_RoleUUID: RoleUUID,
            AuthType_AuthorisationType: req.data.AuthorisationType,
            DraftAdministrativeData_DraftUUID:
              entity.DraftAdministrativeData_DraftUUID,
            AuthEntity_EntityUUID: entity.EntityUUID,
          });

entry.title: Re: Designing Service Oriented CAP Plugins
entry.content:
Could you just make a generic npm package rather a CAP Plugin? Could it be similar process for example to the Open AI NPM package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/openai

1. Install - 

npm install openai

2. Import it into your service:

import OpenAI from 'openai';

 3. Use it within your service:

const client = new OpenAI({
  apiKey: process.env['OPENAI_API_KEY'], // This is the default and can be omitted
});

const response = await client.responses.create({
  model: 'gpt-4o',
  instructions: 'You are a coding assistant that talks like a pirate',
  input: 'Are semicolons optional in JavaScript?',
});

entry.title: 自動付款可否跨公司不同公司幣別進行付款
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
商業情境為母公司代子公司付款，但母公司和子公司的公司幣別不同，因系統上標準功能設定傳送公司為子公司付款公司為母公司，限制為：母公司幣別與子公司幣別國家及扣繳稅類型需相同，故無法使用大批付款。

請問要如何解決上述沖銷情境。

entry.title: Re: SAP Sapphire 2025: Notes from Day 1 Keynote with a focus on Developers
entry.content:

Is this event recorded? Will it be published to watch again?

Thank you.

entry.title: 供應商發票可否跨公司不同公司幣建立
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
商業情境為
客戶需建立一張表頭為母公司公司幣別USD，表身item1為子公司公司幣別JPY,item2為子公司公司幣別USD。
目前按照標準流程的限制只能建立表頭為母公司USD公司幣別，表身item1為子公司USD公司幣(有開Scopeitem 1GP)的情況下。

請問要如何產生表頭母公司USD表身子公司公司幣別為JPY幣別的供應商發票。

entry.title: Re: Deprecated class de.hybris.platform.webservicescommon...
entry.content:
Hi,
There is a class in the platform package. you can replace  de.hybris.platform.webservicescommons.util.YSanitize  with 
de.hybris.platform.util.Sanitizer#sanitize

Hope this helps you.

entry.title: 未本地化國家的公司幣別如何設定？
entry.content:
Hi Expert,
因導入公司所設籍公司並未本地化，故只能選擇德國，但公司幣別因無法更改會自動決定為歐元。

兩個問題：

1.要如何將公司改為開曼?

2.設定公司後要如何將公司改為USD?

entry.title: Re: Timesheet in days or hours in SAP4/HANA

entry.title: Re: A bug of filter in fact data preview?
entry.content: The bug disappeared in this morning, what happened last night after my post?

entry.title: Hardcoding users in transformation logic of IPS to provide access for SAC Reporting
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We need to hardcode users in IPS to grant access to Story Reports. Earlier, we were using the sf.user.filter in the properties and added the respective usernames there. But there are more than 100 users now to be hardcoded and we cannot continue to add in this filter because of the character limit.

Can anybody give an idea if this hardcoding for providing access to SAC reporting can be done via transformation logic of source/target system?

What code can be added to hardcode such users?

Thanks in advance for your response.

entry.title: Re: 2025 Sapphire Selfies with Bluebeard

entry.title: RAP event trigger via SAP GUI tcode
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am working on to consume RAP event from sales order creation. As per requirement, standard event should trigger from sales order creation via EML, Sales order app and SAP GUI related tcode(VA01) as well.

As far as I know RAP event doesn't trigger from SAP GUI tcode. Can anyone help here if there is any way to trigger standard rap event from SAP GUI tcode VA01 ?

Thanks.

Regards,

Jitendra

entry.title: Re: ODP source returned error Maximum waiting time of 7.2...
entry.content:
Hello,

Though below KBAs are for the product of SAP data services, they should also be applicable for SAP Cloud Integration for data services, Can you please refer below and see if they are applicable for your case? https://me.sap.com/notes/2010050/E
https://me.sap.com/notes/2359687/E

You can also follow https://me.sap.com/notes/2453327/E to test the extractor in RODPS_REPL_TEST

Best Regards,
Joy

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere: On Premise SFTP connectivity
entry.content:
An alternative way to obtain&validate the Host Key. This could be useful in case of "reject HostKey"/"HostKey mismatch"/"HostKey has been changed" errors.

1. From any console environment that has access to the SFTP server, use "sftp" command line tool to logon to the SFTP server once. E.g.

>sftp -P <port> <user>@<host>

2. After successful logon, exit the sftp command line tool and open ~/.ssh/known_hosts

There should be host key entries like:

[<host>]:<port> ssh-rsa AAAAB3Nza....

3. Copy the line starting from the key algorithm "ssh-rsa AAAAB3Nza...." to the end. And that will be what's needed in "Host Key" field for Generic SFTP connection in Datasphere.

Of course the authenticity of the Host Key needs to be checked with SFTP server admin.

entry.title: Re: Place image at top right in Compensation Statement
entry.content: Hi Xavier, Got it. Will accordingly communicate this to the business. Thank you for your help 🙂

entry.title: Re: How Subcontracting Cockpit ME2ON creates SD delivery?

entry.title: Encrypted External ID – LMS
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

From our collaborator template synchronized with the learning module, we have collaborators where the "External ID" field is displayed as encrypted.

Note:  The organizational data has been hidden.

The expected behavior would be as follows: For example,

User ID employee central: 102030

External user ID LMS: 102030 The User Summary Data Audit Report (CSV) shows that the profile information is encrypted when synchronized.

The standard Learning History report displays the information with the User ID field in the same way: 72571E006C364ABC8B29787493C65A97

Could you indicate if there is any parameter that controls this behavior?

entry.title: Re: Questionmark cannot launch sample exam / I s this the...
entry.content: Regarding the issue "I have also the issue, the system says, my Teams is open but it is closed. What can I do?" raised by @natalia 1973 I encountered the same issue recently. Here's the set of steps I followed to resolve it: ✅ Fix: Questionmark Secure Browser Blocked by Microsoft Teams If you're seeing the error message: "Please close the following applications and relaunch Questionmark Secure: Microsoft Teams", do the following: Close Microsoft Teams from the system tray: Right-click the Teams icon near the clock (bottom-right corner of your screen). Click Quit. If it's still running in the background: Press Ctrl + Shift + Esc to open Task Manager. Find Microsoft Teams under the Processes tab. Select it and click End Task. After fully closing Teams, I was able to launch Questionmark Secure without any issues. Thanks to AI for helping me figure this out quickly! 🙌

entry.title: Re: Set default value when creating a sales order
entry.content:
Hi Ricardo,

you can use a FMS (formatted search) for this job. It could react entering a CardName or a CardCode.

regards Lothar

entry.title: Re: Handling Free-Form Text in SAP CPI: Segmenting Long Text into 132-Character Chunks with Groovy
entry.content:
Thanks for this - looks great.

Just one remark - when dealing with text that will be 'protected' later in the backend 2 spaces are needed for preserving the format information of the initial incoming text. (Notifications long text)

The system will shift the text line content by 2 positions to the right in each line.

Thus it would be safe to work with max length of 130 characters for each chunk for such cases.

entry.title: Data Products in SAP Business Accelerator Hub
entry.content: Find more information about Data Products on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub.

entry.title: Re: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Mod...
entry.content:
@SKSKumar 

You can only use 2 measure from 2 different model to create a third measure if the models are blended. Given that one of you model is DS based, just check if blending is possible. Without blending you cannot use measures from different model.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: How to Add Calculated Measures from Two Different Mod...
entry.content: You may try to use LINK formula in calculated measure creation in modeler.

entry.title: A ranges utility
entry.content:
You can install the repository using abapgit  (available on github )

For many years, I was annoyed by the cumbersome handling of ABAP ranges. There were countless attempts to program a tool to simplify their use. This repository is the result of my efforts. It essentially consists of the class ZCL_RANGE.

The idea is to build the range within a utility class and pass it to the caller afterwards. With ZCL_RANGE, you can do it like this:

* simple one-value range
my_range = zcl_range=>init( )->equals( 'A' )->get( ).
* transforming internal tables to range
data begin of struc.
data   field type string.
data end of struc
data tab like standard table of struc.

tab = value #( ( field = 'A' ) ( field = 'B' ) ).
* the first component is taken
my_range = zcl_range=>init( )->equals( tab )->get( ).
* possible also with non-structured tables

There are more possibilities like between( ), not( ), exclude( )... Look at the readme of the github repository: https://github.com/jrgkraus/abap_zrange

entry.title: Re: Upgrading sap_java_buildpack to sap_java_buildpack_ja...
entry.content:
Hi friends,

I found out the solution,

We have to specify this two below env variables under the
properties tag in the mta.yaml file 

properties:
    JBP_CONFIG_COMPONENTS: "jres: ['com.sap.xs.java.buildpack.jre.SAPMachineJRE']"
    JBP_CONFIG_SAP_MACHINE_JRE: '{ version: 21.+ }'

 

This is working fine

Best Regards,
Mohanraj V

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @karl_kessler, the business catalog mentioned in your post above and in the documentation (SAP_A4C_BC_DEV_AIQ_PC), is it supposed to be available on lower releases as well?

We are on a S4HANA 2022 SP2 private cloud and have implemented the mentioned note https://me.sap.com/notes/3513374 - but we seem unable to find this particular business catalog.

What might we be missing?

entry.title: Information on reset and reverse document.
entry.content:
I have clearing document which was reset and reversed. Now how can I identify this clearing doc was generated for which original document.
ex

Document No: 1 (Having clearing Document No as 2)
Now I have Reset and reversed the Document No 2.

Now how would I trace back that 1 was the Document No which initially got cleared against doc 2.

entry.title: Re: my data action has no error , but it is not working
entry.content: Please also explain what you are trying to achieve with this piece of code.

entry.title: Re: Upgrading sap_java_buildpack to sap_java_buildpack_ja...
entry.content: Thanks, We have to specify this two below env variables under the properties tag in the mta.yaml file  properties: JBP_CONFIG_COMPONENTS: "jres: ['com.sap.xs.java.buildpack.jre.SAPMachineJRE']" JBP_CONFIG_SAP_MACHINE_JRE: '{ version: 21.+ }'

entry.title: Period is open in MM but still is not allowing to post in that period
entry.content:
Hi SAP community 

i am facing a proble for post in MIGO Process in current month even that period is open. i am unable post in that period. can any solve this 

For your reference i am attaching screen shots here. 

1. This error is showing :

2. I checked following 

> OB52 Period is opened

> in MMRV Period is Opened 

 

but still system could allow me to post.

entry.title: SAC embed mode not working on mobile devices
entry.content:
Hi all,

We tried to integrate sac content (stories etc) via iframe in our Fiori System. It works in the browsers on laptops but not on mobile devices. The issue: because the fiori url is different from the iframe url (sapanalyticscloud….) . Because of this the Story will not open on iOS devices (for example).I figured That this is because of the Setting „Prevent Cross Site Tracking“. I think this is also because we have idp in between and using saml for auth. Anyone having the same issue? Unfortunately sap do not offering proxy urls so you could have sac in your own url area.

Ideally we would like to keep fiori as our single point of entry for our users…

entry.title: Re: REST Integration, Missing Test and edit data structure - Free Edition -
entry.content: Agree, this is a serious omission as previously we could easily test the API and see the results and auto-build the fields.  There appears to be no way to change any of the settings without deleting and creating a new data entity.  Is this an interim step or are we missing something?

entry.title: Re: Full Stack ABAP Application In Build
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, please let me know if you find any solution

entry.title: Re: Integration | Parallel Operation | S4 | SAP Digital M...
entry.content: Hi, please help me to understand Simultaneous routing is possible to create using Routing API SAP DM?

entry.title: Re: How to create/define alphanumeric document type & nun...
entry.content:
Hi Pratik Malasane,

It is not possible to have document types created with 4 digits. Document type is a two charcter field and cannot be extended to 4. If a number range is assigned to a docuemnt type, system will use that number range. We cannot assign two number ranges to one docuemnt type and use both of them.

entry.title: Re: Intercompany billing (IGA) account assignment
entry.content:
Hi,

You need to have the proper account assignment in Idoc itself. You need to do some custom logic in idoc so that right cost assignment is updated based on sales order. Automatic account assignemtn or substitution wil not work in Idoc case, because no accountng document is generated because of Idoc failure.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error: Mandatory condition UTXJ is missing
entry.content: hi man thanks for the reply.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error: Mandatory condition UTXJ is missing
entry.content: you have guided in this text in very much detail, and i am admired.

entry.title: Re: Pricing error: Mandatory condition UTXJ is missing
entry.content: you have guided in this text in very much detail, and i am admired. thank you for guiding in such detail and i get it resolved for me.

entry.title: Re: MD04 collection entry
entry.content:
Hello KDN,

in the public cloud environment the collective entry is not available any more.

Use Fiori Apps: SAP recommends using Fiori apps like "Monitor Material Coverage" or "Manage Material Coverage".

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Hi @AlexanderRother ,

The issue is resolved and my Joule copilot is also activated and working fine.

Now i  want to  add Create Business Object functionality  along with it , which i think comes under this license, it was mentioned it will launch  in 2505 update any idea about it?

Thanks,
Basant Joshi

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay: Business Goals Assignment to Bonus Plans
entry.content:
Dear @xavierlegarrec, thank you very much for your prompt reply.

And a follow-up question: this configuration will have no issue regarding the total weight sum checked by the system? For example, in the above case the system has a warning message mentioning that the total weight is above 100%, but I assume this is simply a warning, it will still work correctly and pick the right business goals per employee and the respective weighting?

Also, is there a limit on how many different business goals we could assign to a general bonus plan? For example there might be performance issues to consider?

My customer would need business goals per country, division even location. So per Bonus Plan we could have dozens or hundreds of business goals to be assigned to one Bonus Plan.

Thank you once again for the help.

Susana

entry.title: Re: Field functional area is only display in CJXX even if...
entry.content:
Helloo Rewadee, 

have you choosen the right screen group in OPUJ? 

If the field ist located at wbs and not project definition, you have to choose "input" for the functional location at wbs screen group. 

I hope this helps. 

Tobias

entry.title: Delivery 80000057 does not exist in the database or in the archive
entry.content:
i am trying to post an Outbound Delivery document for my sales order, when i save it, the system do not give me any error about saving it.

but when saved and i check the stock the stock does not change as no material is issued to customer, because that Outbound delivery / Goods Issue document does not saved and archived and when i try to check it in the Document Flow (F5) of my Sales Order, it did not show their either.


on the other hand, when i try to post the Outbound Delivery document without reference to Sales Order, then it is saving the document, archiving it properly and showing the change in inventory stock for this material in MMBE.

how to fix this error.

entry.title: Re: The Link Collection for Create Sales Orders – Automatic Extraction
entry.content: Nice blogs collection!

entry.title: Re: PowerDesigner NODE.JS update
entry.content: Hello Ondrej,It is currently planned that the version of Node.js provided with PD 16.7 SP09 will be 22.13.1. For your information, SP09 is expected around July.

entry.title: Re: Relationship between Sales Office and Sales Group
entry.content: Hello Community, we would like to know if there are any updates to this? What is the SAP recommended approach currently with this case? We are facing same issue in our project: one sales group should be assigned to several sales offices as they work for more than one office. As it is not possible, it would make user experience very bad in case we would need to have separate groups for same under each office and then for reporting there is always need to select all of those (also you can only add as default value only one - so lot of manual extra work)

entry.title: What is the Process for e-invoicing
entry.content: What is the procedure for obtaining a Peppol network ID? Since we already have access to SAP DRC, which includes an access point, is it still necessary to acquire a separate Peppol ID for e-invoicing?

entry.title: Re: Downtime during s/4 cloud public updates + 24/7 produ...
entry.content:
Hello Martiyn,

this is a typical question, not only in the public cloud scenario. A downtime or a system failure is always possible, independent of the type of system.

In general, it depends on your system landscape. Do you have only S/4HANA Public Cloud are is there also e.g. a SAP DM system involved. Some systems have an "EDGE" functionality.

You need to check all necessary activities and try to find solutions, e.g. print labels upfront, or note down material movement to post them after the downtime.

I hope this helps.

Regards Johannes
Johannes Schulte | Senior SAP Expert
Email: johannes.schulte@vico-finconsulting.vicoland.com
On behalf of: Vicoland GmbH
Website: www.vicoland.com/sap

entry.title: Re: Wrong password for new company database
entry.content:
Hi
Please try below mentioned steps:

  1. - Open the Windows Registry Editor, Navigate to HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAP Manage\SAP Business One. Right-click the SAP Business One key, select New → DWORD (32-bit) Value, name the new DWORD as "CockpitStartTime", set the value to 10 in decimal, and restart SAP Business One.
    - If the issue still is not resolved, incrementally increase the value of "CockpitStartTime" to 20, then 30.
  2. Disable the cockpit.
  3. They can try work with Single Sign On (SSO) with no issues.
  4. Latest workaround with using the lowercase username.

    Still having issue, please create incident using component SBO-BC-SLD.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support
